symbols: mosque entrance — place of communal worship and submission to God
ascending steps — spiritual ascent toward the divine
striped stonework — traditional Islamic sacred architecture denoting holy ground
description: A large mosque facade with alternating horizontal bands of red and cream stone dominates the scene. Several robed figures ascend wide stone steps toward an arched doorway. A seated vendor with a red head covering sits near a crate at the base of the steps. Additional dark-robed figures walk along the narrow street beside the towering masonry walls. Warm light bathes the scene, casting soft shadows across the weathered stone surfaces.
